corpus_text_source: Mein Kampf: 1943 Eher edition OCR via Archive.org (mein-kampf-german_202412). Speeches: BSB stenographic record OCR (Reichstag 1939) / Metapedia transcription of 1941 official pamphlet (Proclamation). Files are gitignored.
scholarly_reference: IfZ critical edition (Mein Kampf, 2016) / Domarus German edition (speeches, 1963) — authoritative print sources for cross-checking; not the digital source actually downloaded.

documents.title: Mein Kampf, Band I, Kapitel 2: Wiener Lehr- und Leidensjahre
documents.source_citation: Hitler, Adolf. Mein Kampf. Zentralverlag der NSDAP, Franz Eher Nachf., München, 851.–855. Auflage, 1943. OCR text via Archive.org item mein-kampf-german_202412 (djvu). Chapter extracted by string-marker script. Scholarly cross-reference: IfZ critical edition (Hartmann et al., 2016).
documents.gloss_reference: Murphy 1939 ch. 2 ('Years of Study and Suffering in Vienna'), via Project Gutenberg Australia.

documents.title: Rede vor dem Deutschen Reichstag, 30. Januar 1939 (Prophezeiungsrede)
documents.source_citation: Verhandlungen des Deutschen Reichstags. Stenographische Berichte, 460. Band, 1939. 1. Sitzung, 30. Januar 1939. BSB digitized copy bsb00000613 (pages 2–23). Text extracted via phrase-query OCR search at reichstag-abgeordnetendatenbank.de (2026-06-14); 47 snippets, covering analytically critical passages; some gaps in Roosevelt-response section. Scholarly cross-reference: Domarus, Bd. 2, S. 1047–1067.
documents.gloss_reference: German Propaganda Archive (Calvin University) English translation.

documents.title: Proklamation an das deutsche Volk, 22. Juni 1941
documents.source_citation: Proklamation des Führers an das Deutsche Volk (official pamphlet, Berlin, 22. Juni 1941). Primary print: Bouhler (Hrsg.), Der großdeutsche Freiheitskampf, Bd. 3, Eher 1942, S. 51–61. Digital transcription: Metapedia DE ('Quelle / Rede vom 22. Juni 1941'), citing the official 1941 pamphlet; Archive.org item ProklamationDesFhrersAnDasDeutscheVolkUndNoteDesAuswrtigenAmtes. Metapedia wiki preamble stripped; closing Tagesbefehl and footnotes excluded. Scholarly cross-reference: Domarus, Bd. 2, S. 1726–1732.
documents.gloss_reference: German Propaganda Archive (Calvin University) English translation (Bouhler source: Der großdeutsche Freiheitskampf, vol. 3, 1942, pp. 51–61).
